title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself and your daily life. Answer naturally and try to give reasons for your answers.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: How long have you been studying English?
What do you enjoy most about learning English?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: How much time do you spend online each day?
Do you think the internet has made life easier or more stressful?
What do you mainly use the internet for in your daily life?
Do you think young people are too dependent on the internet?
Have you ever tried to reduce the amount of time you spend online?

phases.name: Opinions & Preferences
questions: Do you think the internet has made people more or less informed?
Should social media platforms be responsible for what users post?
How do you think our relationship with technology will change in the future?
